creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
The path for pkfonts doesn't match with the patch that other
applications (Xdvi, for example) expect. This means that app. take
more time because they don't use pkfonts.

How-To-Repeat: The following patch makes things better for new ports, but this path
should be coordinated with TeX and xdvi. 
In particular, it is evident they should go in share, but it's not
clear if fonts should be extracted in either
${DEFAULT_FONT_PATH} or ${DEFAULT_FONT_PATH}/pk
